raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "cup_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "Cup_1 is in front of box_2 with its top unobstructed; the right arm can reach it from above without colliding with either box.",
    "Postcondition": "Cup_1 is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "front-left region of the table (clear area)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "With claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The robot is holding cup_1 and the front-left region of the table is free of objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Cup_1 is placed safely on the front-left region of the table, out of the manipulation workspace for the boxes, and released by the robot."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Box_2’s front face is now unobstructed (cup removed) and there is at least 30 cm of free space in front of it on the table to allow a forward push without hitting other objects.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_2 is translated ~20 cm forward, creating a clear lateral gap between box_2 and box_1; the two boxes are no longer attached."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "With box_2 moved forward, both the front and rear faces of box_1 are accessible; enough clearance exists on either side for the arms to approach and secure the box.",
    "Postcondition": "Both end-effectors are pressing against opposite faces of box_1, providing a stable, symmetric grasp suitable for lifting the 30 cm box."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "frontally",
    "Precondition": "Box_1 is securely grasped by both arms; the robot’s stance is balanced for lifting.",
    "Postcondition": "Box_1 is lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop and held stably in mid-air, completing the task of picking up the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: Cup_1 is in front of box_2 with its top unobstructed; the right arm can reach it from above without colliding with either box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Cup_1 is securely grasped by the right end-effector and lifted a few centimetres above the tabletop.

parsed_json.Target: front-left region of the table (clear area)
parsed_json.Precondition: The robot is holding cup_1 and the front-left region of the table is free of objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Cup_1 is placed safely on the front-left region of the table, out of the manipulation workspace for the boxes, and released by the robot.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_2’s front face is now unobstructed (cup removed) and there is at least 30 cm of free space in front of it on the table to allow a forward push without hitting other objects.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_2 is translated ~20 cm forward, creating a clear lateral gap between box_2 and box_1; the two boxes are no longer attached.

parsed_json.Precondition: With box_2 moved forward, both the front and rear faces of box_1 are accessible; enough clearance exists on either side for the arms to approach and secure the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Both end-effectors are pressing against opposite faces of box_1, providing a stable, symmetric grasp suitable for lifting the 30 cm box.

parsed_json.Precondition: Box_1 is securely grasped by both arms; the robot’s stance is balanced for lifting.
parsed_json.Postcondition: Box_1 is lifted approximately 10 cm above the tabletop and held stably in mid-air, completing the task of picking up the darker box.
